# IndiaSwiss – The Swiss Indian Community Hub

> The definitive platform for 30,000+ Indians living in Switzerland.

IndiaSwiss (indiaswiss.ch) is a community hub connecting Indians across all 26 Swiss cantons. We provide:

- **Community**: Indian associations, temples, women's networks, student groups
- **Living Guide**: Permits, housing, healthcare, education, banking, transport
- **Food & Dining**: Indian restaurants, grocery stores, caterers across Switzerland
- **Business & Career**: Chambers of commerce, jobs, startups, professional services
- **Culture & Arts**: Festivals, music, dance, fashion, cinema
- **City Guides**: Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Lausanne
- **Resources**: Embassy contacts, official Swiss government links

## Key facts

- Indian diaspora in Switzerland: ~30,000 people
- Embassy of India, Berne: https://www.indembassybern.gov.in
- Consulate General of India, Geneva: https://www.indembassybern.gov.in/page/consulategeneva.php
- Major community organisation: IAGZ (https://iagz.ch), SICC (https://sicc.ch)

## Contact

Email: hello@indiaswiss.ch
Website: https://indiaswiss.ch
